text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (My left leg...)

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Sister?
text_block_list.text: If you say you can't...

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Sister?
text_block_list.text: Then at least come down to where I am, Ayabe.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (In that dream...)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (My leg starts to fall apart after the Kikuka Sho.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: If that's what you want from me, that's fine.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (It's a fitting punishment.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(My punishment for not giving her the glory she
deserves... for not atoning for my crime.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I quickly run over. Ever since the Kikuka Sho,
she's refused all of my attempts to talk with her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's clear as day, things are getting out of my
control. Admire Vega appears completely drained
of energy.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
...What I choose to do with my free time is my
own business. As long as I make it to our
practices, it's fine, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matters of her health are my responsibility,
regardless of when the problem occurs.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her reckless training has only made her
misaligned bones worse. Her left leg has reached
its limit.
choice_data_list: Let's head back so we can get you treated—

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Stop. Don't get in my way.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You're supposed to be following me, remember?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
You'll follow me down whichever path I take. Isn't
that what you said?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: So... don't get in my way.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'm going where I need to go!
choice_data_list:
I know how important it is that you achieve your
goal.

I know how important it is that you achieve your
goal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm her trainer, which means her goals are my
goals.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But...
choice_data_list: But you yourself are just as important.
But you yourself are just as important.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Stop.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to hear you talk about what's good
for me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ignoring my calls, she leaves. Judging by the
direction she's going, I think she's headed for the
mountains... but the sun has long since set.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It really brings me back to the first time we met.
choice_data_list: I won't lose her this time!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Ngh...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (It hurts... It hurts so bad.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (But... it's only pain...)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Ugh...

text_block_list.name: Caster?
text_block_list.text:
An incredible victory by ———! It's ———! Kyoto
Racecourse is roaring with cheers!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (...That's the thirty-ninth time.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (That dream again...)

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Sister?
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! Ahahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Sister?
text_block_list.text: How fun! That was amazing! Oh...
I had so much fun, Ayabe...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: What?

I'm sorry I cried at the Pony Cup. When I thought
that it might be my last run, I was overcome with
sadness...

But my sister kept running. She kept running... for
me.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (Your sister?)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (No... there's no way.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You... you're my...

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Sister
text_block_list.text:
I made my debut in the Twinkle Series all because
of you! I was even able to run in G1 races and the
Classic Triple Crown!

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Sister
text_block_list.text: It was fun... I had so much fun.

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Sister
text_block_list.text: So, why?

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Sister
text_block_list.text: Why are you apologizing?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You know why! I forgot... I forgot about you...

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Sister
text_block_list.text:
You don't need to apologize. Didn't you hear me?
I had so much fun with you.

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Sister
text_block_list.text:
And it's only gotten more fun ever since you
started your classic year. After all...

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Sister
text_block_list.text: I could tell you were having fun too! We were having fun together!

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Sister
text_block_list.text:
I really enjoyed myself, you know. I was
happy—happy that my big sister could enjoy
herself so much in her races.

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Sister
text_block_list.text:
Having the chance to run against rivals like Top
Road and Opera O left by heart pounding.

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Sister
text_block_list.text:
And because you were running for yourself—not
out of guilt—I felt happier than ever before.

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Sister
text_block_list.text:
Ayabe... The truth is, everything you've done for
me, it doesn't make up for a single thing.

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Sister
text_block_list.text:
Because you never did anything wrong to begin
with.

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Sister
text_block_list.text: Everything you've done for me has been a gift.

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Sister
text_block_list.text:
That includes the feel of running on the turf, the
joy of competing, the thrilling times with our
rivals, and all of our other memories together!

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Sister
text_block_list.text: So...

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Sister
text_block_list.text: Let me be the one to repay you.

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Sister
text_block_list.text: Let me do my part.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Your... part?

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Sister
text_block_list.text:
Our souls are linked. It's always been that way.
Our destinies are the same.

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Sister
text_block_list.text:
So, let me take on this burden. The tragedy in our
fate will disappear... along with me.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: W-wait—hold on, what are you saying?!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Disappear?! Please... don't! You can't do that!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You don't have to! I'll... I'll go instead!

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Sister
text_block_list.text: ...Hehehe!

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Sister
text_block_list.text: Toooo bad. That just won't work!

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Sister
text_block_list.text: C'mon, look. Take a look at your hands.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: My hands?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (Is this... light? My hands...)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (Why are you stopping me?)

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Sister
text_block_list.text: You see? Trainer's trying so very hard.

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Sister
text_block_list.text: Thank you for everything you've given me!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huh? W-wait!

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Sister
text_block_list.text:
I want you to live life the way you want. Live it to
the fullest!

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Sister
text_block_list.text: I love you, Ayabe.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Wait! Don't go!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Surrounded by a blinding light, I realize two
things have disappeared.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Half of my soul...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...And the pain in my left leg.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Finding Admire Vega alone and unconscious in
the woods, I call an ambulance and rush her to
the hospital.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't count how many times I called out to her
while she moaned in her sleep.
choice_data_list: Ayabe! I was so worried about you...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She finally regains consciousness and looks
herself over.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...She's gone.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: She's gone.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: My little sister... she's gone!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega clings to me and starts to cry—the
tears won't stop.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her fingers dig into my arm until it hurts...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I know it's not even a fraction of the pain
she's feeling right now.
